title: Understanding Buyers
shortSummary: Buyers are people with problems, politics, and pressures. Learn how they think, decide, and what really drives a purchase decision in B2B.
whyItMatters: You cannot sell effectively if you don't understand how people buy. B2B purchases involve multiple stakeholders, competing priorities, and risk aversion. The best salespeople deeply understand their buyer's world — their fears, their goals, their internal politics — and tailor every interaction accordingly.
coreConcepts: The buying committee: champions, decision-makers, blockers
Risk aversion and status quo bias
The buyer's journey: problem-aware to solution-aware to vendor-aware
Emotional vs rational decision-making in B2B
